skip_reason: MCPower Security Proxy wraps other MCP servers with monitoring and policy enforcement. It requires configuration of a downstream MCP server to proxy, and likely needs an API key or account for the MCPower security platform. Cannot test in isolation without these dependencies.

name: io.github.abhishekbhakat/airflow-mcp-server@0.9.0
skip_reason: AUTH_TOKEN is a required secret (JWT token) that must be dynamically obtained from a running Airflow instance. Even with a local Airflow backing service, the JWT token cannot be statically pre-configured and requires an authentication flow against the running instance to generate.
